title: Telecommunications in New Caledonia
content:
Telephones. Country calling code: 687 Telephone s - main lines in use: 53,300 (2004) (up from 44,000 in 1995) Telephones - mobile cellular: 116,400 (2004) (up from 825 in 1995) Telephone system: <br "domestic:" NA <br "international:" satellite earth station - 1 Intelsat (Pacific Ocean) Radio and television.

Radio broadcast stations: AM 1, FM 5, Digital Radio Oceane, shortwave 0 (2009) Radios: 107,000 (1997) Television broadcast stations: 6 (plus 25 low-power repeaters) (1997) Televisions: 52,000 (1997) Internet. Internet Service Provider s (ISPs): 1 (1999) Country code (Top level domain): NC
